items.h: AEW Announces Charity Merchandise In Support Of ALS Research
items.p: AEW's Rebel announced last month that was diagnosed with ALS and is in the terminal stage. AEW is working with two ALS organizations to support research.

items.h: AEW Shop Releases Rebel Merchandise, 100% Profits Going To Those Affected By ALS
items.p: On May 1, former AEW talent Rebel announced that she had been diagnosed with terminal ALS. Rebel was previously with AEW as the manager to Britt Baker. The company has supported Rebel in her...

items.h: Mick Foley Opens Up About WWE Departure Due To Donald Trump Association
items.p: On December 16, Mick Foley effectively cut ties with WWE over its relationship with Donald Trump. Foley let his Legends Deal expire and eventually joined AEW in May, debuting at Double or Nothing....
